steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content: Sentence 1: Sierra Leone's urbanization rose 2015–2020. Sentence 2: West Africa's urbanization rose over the same five-year period. The two facts are simultaneous and parallel.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content:
The logical relationship is simultaneous sequence: Sierra Leone's urbanization rose 2015–2020, and West Africa's urbanization also rose over that same five-year period — two parallel facts happening at the same time. The blank needs a transition signaling simultaneity.
  • Choice A — "In other words,": signals restatement of the same idea, so fails — the second sentence adds a new regional fact, not a paraphrase. ✗
  • Choice B — "Eventually,": signals a later time, so fails — the two trends are simultaneous, not sequential. ✗
  • Choice C — "Concurrently,": means "at the same time," fitting perfectly — both trends happened during the same 2015–2020 window. ✓
  • Choice D — "For example,": signals that sentence 2 is a specific instance of sentence 1, so fails — West Africa's trend is a parallel fact, not an example of Sierra Leone's. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
